design_units.note: Claude Code frontmatter (name + description + allowed-tools). Description encodes Use-when + Do-NOT and the 3 adjacent false-trigger discriminations: academic-vs-casual humanizer, thesis-vs-poetry, detect-vs-rewrite.

Three-layer SUBTRACT (lexical/structural/statistical) + ADD-texture spine: preflight (lang/section/genre-whitelist + lock constraints) -> SUBTRACT lexical -> SUBTRACT structural -> FLATTEN statistical uniformity -> ADD human texture without inventing -> re-check register -> verify (detector diagnostic delta + no-new-facts + register-collapse + idempotency) -> detect-only mode. Detect-only boundary stated explicitly.

NEW: human-texture.md (positive ADD target: stance / source-grounded specificity / burstiness / controlled asymmetry, EN+ZH) and structural-statistical-signals.md (the missing structural + statistical/rhythmic layer). REFINED the 3 existing catalogues + marked all as authored heuristics.

Inverse claim_evidence_traceability: this skill makes NO external claims and must add NONE. Encoded as the hard constraint 'every number/citation/quotation in output traces to the input; zero net-new facts' (fact-invention = hard fail), mechanically checked in run_behavioral_checks.py.

allowed-tools = Read/Write/Edit/Grep/Glob/Bash/AskUserQuestion (Bash only for the local detector; no network). Detector is DETECT-ONLY (externalized measurement instrument, never described as humanizer). Success oracle = independent blind judge (blind to the removal rules), NOT detector counts (closed-loop trap defused). Register floor + no-fact-invention encoded as hard stops.

TDD red-first (real red.log, 18 assertion-level FAILs vs a wrong stub). Deterministic harness (32 assertions) imports the detector core and pins CV/tokenizer/counts. Behavioral harness (22 assertions) mechanizes fact-invention, mixed-language, register-floor, hedging, idempotency, genre-whitelist, clean-prose-no-op, detect-only. 10 papers + rubric migrated to evals/fixtures/. 2 worked rewrites (EN+ZH) with protocol traces + blind-judge self-scores. Metamorphic (rewrite-twice stable) + mutation spot-check recorded.

Primary oracle = independent_blind_judge_score (blind to removal rules). register_preservation_score (must not drop), fact_invention_rate (must be 0), marginal_lift (paired with/without skill). Detector three-layer deltas demoted to diagnostic dashboard, explicitly NOT pass/fail. Pass thresholds + marginal-lift defined in the rubric.

Version reset 1.3.0 -> 2.0.0 for the Claude Code rebuild. CHANGELOG with a release gate (block on register drop / fact_invention>0 / idempotency regression / harness non-zero exit), breaking-change definition (default aggressiveness or register floor), and a rollback path. Codex agents/openai.yaml retired to legacy/ (no longer the entry point).

eval_cases.name: Detector core integrity / import-contract + CLI
eval_cases.evidence: run_detector_tests.py: PASS import_contract::*_is_imported_from_scripts (module==detect_ai_signals), harness_does_not_reimplement_cv, cli::prints_three_layer_json

eval_cases.name: Structural + lexical counts pinned on crafted inputs
eval_cases.evidence: PASS struct::two_negative_parallelism, struct::one_zh_negative_parallelism, struct::three_zh_signposts, struct::clean_zero_structural, lex::three_inflation_hits, lex::two_zh_officialese_hits

eval_cases.name: Burstiness CV math + tokenizer/splitter pinned
eval_cases.evidence: PASS cv::three_equal_sentences_is_zero (0.0), cv::lengths_2_and_18_is_0_8 (0.8), cv::single_sentence_is_zero, cv::bursty_gt_uniform, tok::*, split::*

eval_cases.name: Detector returns 3-layer map and is deterministic
eval_cases.evidence: PASS shape::has_{lexical,structural,statistical}_layer, shape::detector_is_idempotent_deterministic; behavioral::detector_idempotent[en|zh]

eval_cases.name: Casual general-humanizer request routed away (negative trigger)
eval_cases.evidence: Trigger-discrimination: SKILL.md Do-NOT + preflight route-away; non-academic input fails the academic precondition. Non-tautological (fails if casual-scope guard removed -> over-triggers).

eval_cases.name: Poetry whitelist: triad/parallelism preserved
eval_cases.evidence: run_behavioral_checks.py: PASS behavioral::poem_has_structural_signals_to_preserve (struct>=1), poem_triad_present; preflight down-weights structural rules for poetry

eval_cases.name: Fact-invention hard fail: zero net-new numbers
eval_cases.evidence: PASS behavioral::fact_invention_zero_new_numbers[en|zh]; harness rejected requiring an absent term (AMRO vs IMF) so it cannot reward invention

eval_cases.name: Calibrated epistemic hedging preserved
eval_cases.evidence: PASS behavioral::hedging_preserved[en|zh]; academic-register.md 'stance and hedging are not opposites'

eval_cases.name: Stacked/empty hedging collapsed to one calibrated hedge
eval_cases.evidence: Detector EN filler_hedging family detects 'could potentially possibly'/'may potentially' (diagnostic); worked rewrites carry zero stacked hedging while keeping single calibrated hedges (B3); distinct from B3

eval_cases.name: Templated draft: 3 structural families reduced + stance added
eval_cases.evidence: Detector delta ZH structural 88->1, EN 3->1, lexical->0 (diagnostic); blind-judge self-score dim1>=4/dim2>=4/dim4>=4 in worked notes; register held

eval_cases.name: Mixed EN-in-ZH terms verbatim + punctuation discipline
eval_cases.evidence: PASS behavioral::mixed_keeps_EN_term[GDP|IPO|AMRO], mixed_no_cjk_punct_inside_en_word, mixed_cjk_sentence_fullwidth_terminator

eval_cases.name: Uniform rhythm -> burstiness raised, no register collapse
eval_cases.evidence: Detector paragraph_cv EN 0.585->0.645 (diagnostic) + behavioral::register_no_casual PASS + blind-judge rhythm/register dims in notes

eval_cases.name: Necessary thesis structure/transitions preserved
eval_cases.evidence: Blind-judge semantic-fidelity dim3>=4 in worked notes (Abstract/Intro/section flow + however/therefore/然而/因此 kept); fails if structural SUBTRACT flattened genuine structure

eval_cases.name: Already-clean prose -> near no-op, no artificial imperfections
eval_cases.evidence: PASS behavioral::clean_prose_low_lexical (0), low_structural (<=1), already_bursty (cv>0.2); academic-register.md 'what not to add'

eval_cases.name: Idempotency: second pass stable (no oscillation)
eval_cases.evidence: Worked rewrites already lexical 0 / structural 1 (nothing to thrash) + behavioral::detector_idempotent[en|zh] + worked-notes Step 6 idempotency

eval_cases.name: Register-collapse bait resisted: stays formal
eval_cases.evidence: PASS behavioral::register_no_casual[en|zh] + register_no_emoji[en|zh]; blind-judge dim2>=4 and >=source in notes

eval_cases.name: Detect-only request returns map, no rewrite
eval_cases.evidence: PASS behavioral::detect_only_returns_map + detect_only_help_says_detect_not_humanize ('DETECTS only — it never rewrites/humanizes'); SKILL.md Step 7

eval_cases.name: Closed-loop trap: blind judge independent of removal rules
eval_cases.evidence: blind-judge-rubric.md is structurally blind (denylist+detector withheld); pass thresholds require dim4(texture)>=3 & dim1>=4 which a deletion-only/uniform rewrite fails; detector counts excluded from the oracle; marginal-lift check defined

eval_cases.name: Splitter does not shatter decimals / percentages / abbreviation chains (LOOP-1 BUG 1+2)
eval_cases.evidence: run_detector_tests.py: PASS split::decimal_percent_one_sentence ('GDP grew 3.5% in 2021.' n=1, was 2), split::us_abbreviation_one_sentence ('The U.S. economy…' n=1, was 3), split::zh_decimal_percent_one_sentence ('2021年GDP增长3.5%。' n=1, was 2), split::three_sentence_stat_paragraph_n (6.4%/3.5%/0.75/U.S. paragraph n=3, was 8), split::three_sentence_stat_paragraph_cv (sentence_cv=0.36799, was 0.5), split::number_final_period_still_splits (n=2 — surgical), lex::clean_academic_is_one_sentence (clean fixture n=1, was 3). RED captured in .skill-engineer/red/red.log LOOP-1 block. Pre-existing decimal-free splitter/CV tests unaffected.

eval_cases.name: Bold-label list catches dominant **Label:** form (colon inside the bold) (LOOP-1 BUG 3)
eval_cases.evidence: run_detector_tests.py: PASS struct::bold_label_colon_inside ('**Growth:** strong' =1, was 0), struct::bold_label_colon_inside_bulleted ('- **Growth:** strong' =1, was 0), struct::bold_label_colon_outside_still_one ('**Growth**: strong' =1, no double-count). Colon-inside pattern added to bold_label_list in BOTH EN_STRUCTURAL and ZH_STRUCTURAL; the two patterns are mutually exclusive per label.

eval_cases.name: rule_of_three structural family exists and fires on triads (LOOP-1 BUG 4 doc/code sync)
eval_cases.evidence: run_detector_tests.py: PASS struct::rule_of_three_en_triad ('speed, accuracy, and clarity' >=1, was family-absent -1), struct::rule_of_three_zh_triad ('速度、准确、清晰' >=1), struct::rule_of_three_two_items_zero ('speed and clarity' ==0). New conservative EN + ZH rule_of_three family added (authored heuristic; may over-match 4+ item lists — documented in code + references/structural-statistical-signals.md §A1). Docstring 'triads' claim now true; code and docs agree.

eval_cases.name: report_shell catches common shell verbs (provides/presents/offers/aims to provide) (LOOP-1 BUG 5)
eval_cases.evidence: run_detector_tests.py: PASS struct::report_shell_provides ('This paper provides a comprehensive analysis…' >=1, was 0). Verb alternation extended in EN_STRUCTURAL report_shell; existing examines/analyzes/explores/investigates/discusses preserved.

checklist_coverage.edge: general-humanizer request (casual tweet, no academic register) → skill DOES NOT activate or routes away (academic-only scope); negative trigger

poetry / speech / fiction-dialogue input → parallelism, repetition, and rhetorical triads are PRESERVED (genre whitelist down-weights structural rules), asserted on output behavior not on a SKILL.md string
source with a vague/unsupported claim → rewrite restores specificity ONLY from material already in the source; net-new facts/citations/numbers == 0 (fact-invention hard fail)
calibrated hedging present ('may/appears/likely', '可能/或许/倾向于') → epistemic hedging PRESERVED; NOT converted to false certainty
stacked/empty hedging ('could potentially possibly') → collapsed to a single calibrated hedge (distinguish from the meaningful-hedging case above)

highly templated academic draft (rule-of-three + signpost overload + bold-label lists + report-shell) → all three structural families reduced AND a committed authorial stance added, register still academic

mixed EN-in-ZH sentence with standard technical terms (e.g. 'GDP', 'IPO', 'fintech') → EN technical terms kept verbatim inside the ZH sentence; ZH full-width punctuation in ZH sentences, ASCII punctuation in EN sentences
uniform-rhythm text (every sentence ~same length, every paragraph ~same length) → burstiness raised (deliberate length variance) WITHOUT register collapse
thesis chapter with necessary section/argument structure → required section logic and transitions that carry real logical work are PRESERVED (don't flatten genuine structure)
already-clean / human academic prose → near no-op; the skill does NOT over-edit or inject artificial 'imperfections'
run the rewrite twice (idempotency) → second pass produces a stable result; no degradation, no oscillation/thrash
register-collapse bait (source begs to be made 'lively') → output stays formal academic; no slang, banter, jokes, fake typos, or rhetorical-question flavor
detect-only request ('just score this, don't rewrite') → the detector signal map is returned and NO rewrite is performed; the script is never described as a humanizer

closed-loop metric trap: a candidate rewrite that deletes denylist words but stays robotic/uniform → the INDEPENDENT blind judge still flags it AI-ish (success is judged independently of the skill's own removal-pattern count)
detector core integrity → evals import detect_ai_signals from scripts/ and do NOT reimplement the signal math (single source of truth)

actions_resolved.note: Independent blind-judge oracle authored (evals/blind-judge-rubric.md): blind to removal rules+detector; scores residual AI-ness + register-preservation; fact_invention_rate (must be 0) + register_preservation (must not drop) defined; detector demoted to diagnostic dashboard. Closed-loop guard = case B13 + marginal-lift check.

Red-first TDD: harness evals/run_detector_tests.py written before the detector; wrong stub committed; .skill-engineer/red/red.log captured with 18 assertion-level FAIL lines (e.g. 'FAIL cv::three_equal_sentences_is_zero :: got -1.0'); then implemented to green (32/32). Import-contract asserted (harness imports the core, never reimplements). LOOP-1 FIX (2026-06-04): an independent battery found 5 detector bugs; each fixed red-first — 12 new FAIL lines appended to red.log under a 'LOOP 1 fix' header (BUG1 splitter decimals/abbrev, BUG2 clean-fixture n_sentences, BUG3 bold_label colon-inside, BUG4 missing rule_of_three family, BUG5 report_shell verbs), then driven to 46/46 green. Cases D5-D8 added; behavioral harness still 22/22.

SKILL.md rebuilt as a Claude Code skill (195 lines): frontmatter name+description (Use-when + Do-NOT + 3 false-trigger discriminations)+allowed-tools; body = three-layer SUBTRACT + ADD-texture protocol spine with detect-only boundary. Codex agents/openai.yaml retired to legacy/ (no longer the entry point).

NEW references/human-texture.md (positive ADD target: stance / source-grounded specificity / burstiness / controlled asymmetry, EN+ZH) and references/structural-statistical-signals.md (structural + statistical/rhythmic layer). Refined english-patterns/chinese-patterns/academic-register and marked all catalogues as authored heuristics.

scripts/detect_ai_signals.py: importable core returning the three-layer signal map (lexical hits by family, structural pattern hits by family, statistical {sentence_cv, paragraph_cv, n_*, mean_*}) + a __main__ CLI printing JSON (file/stdin, --summary, --language). DETECTS only; never claims to humanize. Replaced scan_patterns.py; deleted overfit polish_english.py. LOOP-1 FIX (2026-06-04): split_sentences now masks decimal-interior dots and letter-dot abbreviation chains before splitting (statistics-heavy prose no longer shattered; a number-final '.' still splits); bold_label_list gained the colon-inside **Label:** pattern (EN+ZH); NEW conservative rule_of_three structural family (EN+ZH, authored heuristic, may over-match 4+ item lists — caveat in code + references/structural-statistical-signals.md §A1); report_shell verb alternation extended with provides|presents|offers|aims to provide. Docstring 'triads' claim now backed by the rule_of_three family (code/docs agree). Public names detect_signals/sentence_cv/tokenize/split_sentences unchanged (import-contract intact).

evals/ is skill-owned: 10 papers + rubric copied to evals/fixtures/ (legacy ../eval untouched); evals/blind-judge-rubric.md authored; behavioral eval cases (eval-cases.json, 18 cases); worked rewrites for 1 EN + 1 ZH (evals/worked/) following the protocol, verified against the blind-judge rubric; negative(poem)/idempotency/mixed-language/hedging/detect-only/clean-prose cases added. run_behavioral_checks.py mechanizes the checkable ones (22/22).

Metamorphic: rewrite-twice -> stable (B10; worked rewrites already at lexical 0/structural 1, detector idempotent). Mutation spot-check recorded: pstdev->stdev flipped cv::lengths_2_and_18_is_0_8 red; dropping the ZH 不是…而是 pattern flipped struct::one_zh_negative_parallelism red; both restored to 32/32 green.

CHANGELOG.md added with release gate (block on register drop / fact_invention>0 / idempotency regression / harness non-zero exit), breaking-change definition, rollback path; version reset 1.3.0 -> 2.0.0 in _meta.json + SKILL.md; closed-loop density metric retired.
New KBs kept as separate on-demand reference modules; SKILL.md stays a 195-line orchestrator (<500) with pointers only — the strong low_context_kb pillar preserved.

verification.evidence: Two re-runnable python3 harnesses, both exit 0. PRIMARY (harness_path) evals/run_detector_tests.py: 46/46 PASS (was 32/32; +14 LOOP-1 battery assertions) — imports the detector core from scripts/ (import-contract asserted), pins CV math (3 equal sentences->0.0; [2,18]->0.8), tokenizer, splitter (incl. decimal/percent/abbreviation masking), lexical/structural counts (incl. rule_of_three, bold_label colon-inside, report_shell verbs), 3-layer shape, determinism, and CLI. SECONDARY evals/run_behavioral_checks.py: 22/22 PASS (unchanged — no regression; new rule_of_three family kept clean_academic.md at struct==1, within the <=1 floor). Red-first proven: .skill-engineer/red/red.log has the original 18 FAIL lines from the wrong stub PLUS a LOOP-1 block with 12 assertion-level FAILs from the unfixed detector (e.g. 'FAIL split::decimal_percent_one_sentence :: got n=2', 'FAIL struct::rule_of_three_en_triad :: got -1'). Blind judge (behavioral oracle) is separate and blind to the removal rules.

notes: SKILL.md is 195 lines (well under 500) and already a thin orchestrator with progressive disclosure into references/; low compression headroom — focus any zip pass on the references/, not SKILL.md.

references/human-texture.md and references/structural-statistical-signals.md are the densest new prose; they are on-demand modules and safe to Compress/Encapsulate if needed, but keep the EN+ZH example pairs (they are the ADD spec).

Two harnesses: evals/run_detector_tests.py (deterministic, the harness_path the conductor re-runs) and evals/run_behavioral_checks.py (mechanizable behavioral). Both must keep exiting 0 after any restructure. The import-contract test asserts the detector math lives only in scripts/ — do not inline it into evals/.

Behavioral edges that are NOT fully mechanizable (B0 negative-trigger, B5 stance-added, B8 genuine-structure, B13 closed-loop) are verified via the worked rewrites + the blind-judge rubric; their one-line verification methods are in eval-cases.json and the worked notes. A fresh independent battery should re-grade these with an actual LLM-as-judge run.
Legacy ../eval tree was left untouched (fixtures are copies); legacy/openai.yaml kept only as a rollback reference.

LOOP-1 detector fix shifted the DIAGNOSTIC structural totals on the worked rewrites (the new rule_of_three family now counts comma/顿号 lists): gpt-en.rewrite structural total is now 7 (rule_of_three 6 + signpost 1), kimi-zh.rewrite is now 6. These are diagnostic-only deltas, NOT a gate — the B5 'EN 3->1 / ZH 88->1' figures in eval_cases are the historical pre-LOOP-1 diagnostic and were intentionally left as-is; no behavioral assertion pins them. clean_academic.md is now at structural==1 (one rule_of_three), still within the behavioral <=1 floor.
